reviews_list.batch_info: B.Com. with ACCA - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Best infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Overall, students were placed who have skills and industry-based knowledge. The highest package was 12 LPA and the average was 6 LPA. Top companies like KPMG, EY, and PwC offered top roles such as senior manager and accounts manager. Almost all students got internships through college referrals.
review_content.Infrastructure: Luxury rooms were available; 1, 2, 3, and 4-seater rooms with CCTV footage. Wi-Fi was also provided with speeds up to 40 Mbps. Mess food is disappointing. Sports activities and a gym are also provided. Medical facilities are available 24/7, and there is a hospital at the main gate.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in Business Analytics - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with the hostel, campus and faculty members.

review_content.Placements: ? 90%? The highest was of 18 Lacs the lowest of 4-5 Lacs? Tcs, hcl microsoft? 95%? Analyst, manager Chitkara? S BBA programme is known for strong industry connections so students get opportunities across business, finance, marketing, operations, HR and analytics.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the whole university is fabulous. Hostel food is also good they provide and maintain cleanliness. It is also widely appreciated for its modern and well planned infrastructure. SMART classrooms, well stocked libraries, advanced laboratories and innovation and research centres that help student work in competitions. It actually offers a well rounded environment.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in Business Analytics - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Chitkara University – BBA review.

review_content.Placements: The placements are generic for all. There is no such thing as if a student is from analytics, he will get an analytics internship only. Most of the internships that have arrived are from small startups, with profiles for sales internships and stipends ranging from 5k to 15–18k max.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure in the classes is great, with fully air-conditioned rooms and smart TVs in each class. But the mess food is just the worst food ever, with cheap quality items being used, such as Delicious in place of Amul butter. Also, hygiene is not being met as per the money they take from us.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc in Economics with Data Science & AI - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with my college and college placements.

review_content.Placements: 99 percent got placed in the course. The highest package offered is 54 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 4 LPA. Infosys, Disney, and many more companies visited. Everyone got internships in some small companies and local companies. There are many opportunities in accounts, the corporate sector, managing sector, and other fields related to Data Science and AI.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the course and hostel is very good and well maintained. The hostel has spacious rooms. The mess is neat, clean, and healthy. Greenery is available everywhere, and sweepers do cleaning every day. Sports clubs are provided to every student according to their talent.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc in Economics with Data Science & AI - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with this college, and all faculty members are good, and the campus is the best.

review_content.Placements: In our course, 60% of students are placed, and in our specific course, there is no highest or lowest package. All students have equal packages. As I am in 2nd year, I don't know about the recruiting companies of our course, and also, no student has yet gotten an internship, as it will occur in the 3rd year. There are many roles provided, but the main thing is that our course conducts many activities related to study competition, which enhance and improve our skills.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the facilities and infrastructure are very good and nice, and all the things are available. The quality of the hostel is, on average, good, but all the things are available. The quality of food in the mess is okay, but all the other options for eating, like in Square 1, are the best.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in Business Analytics - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure, online exams, good sports events, but just not worth that much money.

review_content.Placements: There are companies like Kyndryl and BMW, which are good companies that came, but after resume upload and all, they never responded. The average package is also around 15,000. The companies that came were also looking for sales, not for course-related roles.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi works really well. There are libraries for every department. Hostel food is not so good, but the arrangements for B.Ed study tables and everything are there. Also, there is a facility for washing clothes, so that's a bonus. Permission things while going out might be helpful for parents.

overview_faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for MBA/PGDM at Chitkara Business School Chandigarh?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for the MBA course at Chitkara Business School ranges from INR 6.60 Lacs to INR 10.20 lakh. The 2 year full-time MBA course is offered in 9 specialisations, namely Marketing, Finance, Logistics & Supply Chain, Business Analytics, Human Resource Management, HealthCare, Retail Management, Pharmaceutical Management, and Banking, Financial Services and Insurance. Candidates need to take a national level entrance exam, such as CAT, XAT, MAT, CMAT or NMAT to take admission.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee of B.Com course at Chitkara Business School?
overview_faqs.answer: The overall fees of an BCom in Chitkara Business School irange from INR 3.6 lakh to INR 3.8 lakh, tuition fees for three years. The BCom fees might includes other include components other than tuition fees, such as one-time fee of INR 20,000, which candidates must pay only at the time admission. After the enrollment, students are required to pay the fee twice a year.

overview_faqs.question: Is CAT compulsory for MBA in Chitkara University?
overview_faqs.answer: Chitkara University MBA admission is based on merit ranking in entrance exams, including CAT, MAT, NMAT, etc. Candidates without national-level exam score can opt for Chitkara University Test. Shortlisted candidates are called for the group discussion and personal Interview. The final decision is made by the jury.

admission_overview.college_name: Chitkara Business School Admission 2025: Eligibility, Application, Fee, Selection Criteria & Dates

paragraphs: Chitkara Business School admissions 2025is bothentrance-basedandmerit-based. The admission process of CBS Chandigarh is initiated through the application form on the official website of the Business School. Candidates are granted admission based on their score obtained in CAT/ MAT/ NMAT/ XAT/ CMAT, followed by Group Discussion and Personal Interview (GD&PI) round for MBA. Candidates who have not appeared for any of the above-mentioned exams need to qualify for theChitkara University Testas well as GD&PI. Candidates interested in applying for UG courses such as BA can apply for the same using their SAT scores. The final shortlisting of candidates for the UG courses is done after the Personal Interview round.

Offering more than 20 courses for candidates in the admission 2025 process, Chitkara Business School offers a world of learning. The campus in Punjab is based just 30 kilometres away from Chandigarh. The courses are offered in a full-time/regular mode. Some popular courses offered by Chitkara Business School Chandigarh are: MBA/PGDM, and BBA. Learn more through the highlights table given below:
Particulars
Chitkara Business School Admission 2025 Highlights
Mode of study
Regular/Full-Time
Programmes Offered
How to apply?
https://admissions.chitkara.edu.in/login
Level of programmes offered
Undergraduate and Postgraduate

MBA| BBA| BCom

The application forms for admissions 2025 are now open. For the programmes with no entrance tests, the seats will be allotted based on merit and the performance in the Personal Interview round. Chitkara Business School offers courses at various levels and these courses have varying eligibility and selection criteria. Learn more about the common eligibility and selection criteria with the help of the table given below:

Candidates who have cleared the admission process for their desired course, must pay the required fee to secure their seat. Chitkara Business School offers a different number of seats for different courses on offer. The Business School holds the rights to change the fee and number of seats. Learn more about the number of seats and course fee through the table given below:
NOTE:The above-mentioned fee and seat intake are taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is subject to changes and hence, is indicative.
Follow the below admission process for Chitkara Business School:
Step 1: Chitkara Business School Application Process 2025
Candidates can apply online on the official website of Chitkara University [chitkara.edu.in] or offline.
Step 2: Selection
Selection will be done on the basis of entrance exam score or the performance in the last qualifying exam (whichever is applicable).
Step 3: Group Discussion & PI round
Candidates who are shortlisted based on their entrance scores must appear for the Group Discussion and Personal Interview round, which are the last stages of the admission process.
Step 4: Payment of Fees & Seat Confirmation
Candidates will be admitted after the payment of the full fee at the time of counselling.
Step 5: Registration
Candidates must get registered for the programme on the first day of the academic session.

faqs.question: What is the selection process for MBA at Chitkara Business School?
faqs.answer: Admissions to the MBA course offered by Chitkara Business School are entrance-based. Candidates must appear for any one of the national level management entrance exams such as CAT/MAT/XAT to participate in the admission process 2025. The first shortlisted is created based on the entrance exam score of candidates. Proceeding further, candidates must appear for the Group Discussion and Personal Interview round. This entrance exam is followed by group discussion and personal interview. faqs.answer: Anaverage SAT score is around 1050it may vary annually, thus, one must check and then prepare. Anythingabove 1200 is considered a good SAT score. The maximum anyone can score on theSAT is the perfect score of 1600. Since you receive scaled scores, you should understand SAT scaled scores and percentiles. faqs.question: Is BBA available in Chitkara University?
faqs.answer: Yes, BBA is available at Chitkara University. BBA in undergraduate level in multiple specialisations. The programme is internationally-accredited and available in eight specialisations including, Fintech, Digital Marketing, Retail Management, etc.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Chitkara University for BBA course?
faqs.answer: Chitkara University admissions are done on both merit as well as entrance exam. Chitkara university also provides admissions based on various exams like MAT, XAT, CAT and for BBA anyone can get admission on the basis of class 12th marks but the cut off rank should be between 9000 to 11000 which is followed by GD and PI round.

faqs.question: What is the selection process for MBA and what is the minimum CAT percentile required?
faqs.answer: Admission to the MBA programme at Chitkara Business School will be based only on the merit ranking in CAT/ XAT/MAT/ CMAT, Group Discussion & Personal Interview. The GD/ PI/ Micro Presentation will be conducted as communicated. All candidates are advised to go through counseling/admission instructions very carefully.you can apply for an MBA at Chitkara University, Chandigarh without a CAT score. Chitkara University considers alternative national and international entrance exams like MAT, XAT, and CMAT instead of CAT scoresGraduates in BCA/ BSc IT/ BSc Computer Science with minimum 55% marks and should have passed Mathematics as a compulsory subject in class 12th/Graduation. Graduate with a minimum of 50% marksThe CAT cut offs for admission to top MBA colleges such as FMS, MDI, SPJIMR among others, range from 90 to 99 percentile.

faqs.question: What are the entrance exams accepted by Chitkara Business School?
faqs.answer: Chitkara Business School accepts various entrance exams such as CAT/MAT/XAT and SAT to accept candidates for the courses on offer. Candidates can check the entrance exam they need to appear for on the official website of the college. Candidates seeking admission to the BBA course can appear for SAT. Meanwhile, candidates seekiong admission to the MBA/PGDM course must appear for a national level management entrance exam.

reviews.review_heading: Best infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Luxury rooms were available; 1, 2, 3, and 4-seater rooms with CCTV footage. Wi-Fi was also provided with speeds up to 40 Mbps. Mess food is disappointing. Sports activities and a gym are also provided. Medical facilities are available 24/7, and there is a hospital at the main gate.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the hostel, campus and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the whole university is fabulous. Hostel food is also good they provide and maintain cleanliness. It is also widely appreciated for its modern and well planned infrastructure. SMART classrooms, well stocked libraries, advanced laboratories and innovation and research centres that help student work in competitions. It actually offers a well rounded environment.

reviews.review_heading: Chitkara University – BBA review.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure in the classes is great, with fully air-conditioned rooms and smart TVs in each class. But the mess food is just the worst food ever, with cheap quality items being used, such as Delicious in place of Amul butter. Also, hygiene is not being met as per the money they take from us.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college and college placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the course and hostel is very good and well maintained. The hostel has spacious rooms. The mess is neat, clean, and healthy. Greenery is available everywhere, and sweepers do cleaning every day. Sports clubs are provided to every student according to their talent.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college, and all faculty members are good, and the campus is the best.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities and infrastructure are very good and nice, and all the things are available. The quality of the hostel is, on average, good, but all the things are available. The quality of food in the mess is okay, but all the other options for eating, like in Square 1, are the best.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, online exams, good sports events, but just not worth that much money.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi works really well. There are libraries for every department. Hostel food is not so good, but the arrangements for B.Ed study tables and everything are there. Also, there is a facility for washing clothes, so that's a bonus. Permission things while going out might be helpful for parents.

reviews.review_heading: The college is a little bit expensive.
reviews.review_text: You can visit anytime with your queries. Hostels are comparable to other universities, and the food is eatable. Medical facilities and sports are available and quite good. Free Wi-Fi is provided. Classrooms are air-conditioned and feel luxurious.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and open environment.
reviews.review_text: Hostel infrastructure is good as well so many a variety of rooms like 4 seater, 3 seater, and 2 seater with AC non AC rooms so it's good. Students can make flexible changes, mess food is also flexible you get so many options. In food as well, overall college infrastructure is good and environment is open, sports tournaments are also conducted.

reviews.review_heading: It has good faculty members, a supportive environment, and decent placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus has good Wi-Fi, clean classrooms, and a decent library. Hostels are well-maintained, and the mess food is average. Sports and medical facilities are available. The library has a decent selection of books and digital resources. The campus is very elegant.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing college with amazing placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good. It provides clean drinking water, good Wi-Fi, spacious labs, and classrooms. The library is also good. The hostel is good. Overall, the rooms are good as well. The food is average, and medical facilities are good. Sports and games do happen. There is a gym as well.

reviews.review_heading: It is the worst college. I am dissatisfied, and it is not recommended.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and the library are good. The hostel food is the worst. There are 4 congested beds in a room. The infrastructure is not that great. We found insects in the hostel food. Every activity, function, and DJ night is there for hostel students and not for any other day scholar students, which is the worst.

reviews.review_heading: Our university is the best compared to others.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our university include a large playground, indoor and outdoor games, clean classrooms, drinking water facilities, lift facilities, Wi-Fi facilities, and a library. Canteen food is good but costly. The hostel facilities are also good. Electricity, water, gym, and food in the mess are sometimes good

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities are also fine.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this department is beautiful and fully developed. Classrooms are well-built and have AC. When it comes to libraries, they have different libraries for different disciplines, like engineering students have their own library in their building. Business students have their library in their building, and students are only allowed to enter their respective libraries. The library of business school has numerous books, but when it comes to the subjects related to data science, esp...

reviews.review_heading: This university provides knowledge with fun.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are so well-maintained and fully equipped with furniture, AC, projector, powerpoints, beautiful view, ventilation, and washrooms are clean. Hostel facilities are good. Food is amazing and buses are so comfortable. It also provides adequate medical facility.

reviews.review_heading: My college is great in terms of infrastructure and the type of quality food we get.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is marvellous. I am a day scholar, so I don't know the condition of the mess or hostel. It is average. Sports and games facilities are hygienic and quite nice with a bunch of co-curricular activities and clubs to join.

faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offer best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.
A:    Anand College of Pharmacy has been rated 3.7 on placements.

review_content.General: Classrooms were well-equipped with modern infrastructure. The labs had all the amenities required with proper tools and equipments. The library consists of all the study materials and books needed for the course. Hostel rooms are spacious, but cleanliness is a matter of concern. The food is not very good, it's still edible. Canteen is huge and serves a variety of dishes. There is a dispensary in the campus as well to give medical attention to those in need. There is a National level stadium in the campus with exposure to sports equipments to make sure that all the necessities to navigate the sports and games are met.

reviews_list.review_title: The campus life is fine. Students have to follow a set of guidelines such as attendance, etc.

review_content.Placements: In this college, placements are average. The minimum salary package offered ranges between 3 LPA to 4 LPA. Teachers work with students to get placements in good companies. Almost 50% of students are placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was good. It provides a canteen, ground, and stadium. Our college arranges various tournaments for students. The hostel facilities are very good.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are excellent and supportive. They clear all students' doubts and provide mentorship to students for any problem in career or personal. All teachers are well qualified. They are very friendly with students.

review_content.Placements: The placements for this course are average. They are neither good nor bad. The average placement of pharmacy is about 2.2 to 3.3 LPA. The fee of the college is 1 lakh 19 thousand with bus. The college is good.
review_content.Infrastructure: Very good infrastructure and hostel facility. There are both separate hotels, i.e. girls and boys. The girl’s hostel name is sharda hastel. The boy’s hostel name is Vivekanand hostel. The seniors are very supportive. The infrastructure of the college is very good.
review_content.Faculty: The faculty is experienced and the educated faculty members focus mainly on clearing concepts. Most of the faculty has done M.Pharma and they guide students on how to perform that particular practical. They mainly focus on the concepts and the core of the pharmacy.

review_summary.college_name: Sharda School of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college had a good infrastructure with a very big stadium along with an interactive faculty.

content.Placements: Above 60% of the students were placed in my batch. The highest package offered in pharmacy was 6 LPA, the lowest package was 1.5 LPA and the average package offered was around 3.5 LPA. Top recruiters are alembic and pulses. About 80% of the students get internships from here in Dr. Morepen laboratories and S. N. Medical college. Top roles offered are that of pharmacology, pharmacovigilance.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is quite good. The classrooms are very big. The college has 4 floors and every floor has one water cooler. There is a library which consists of almost all the books related to pharmacy, along with all the classes being smart classrooms. There is an activity center where multiple indoor and outdoor games like badminton are available. There is a music room also. Quality of the food is also good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: They need to take care of the faculty as it is a vital factor for the students to get placed.

content.Placements: Around 40-50% of the students got placed. The highest package offered was 7 Lacs, the lowest was around 2 Lacs and the average package offered was approximately 3-4 Lacs. The top recruiting companies that visited the campus were Alembic pharmaceuticals, Romsons group, Scribex and more. Doing an internship was a part of the curriculum (compulsory). The companies that offered internships were Yug pharmaceuticals, Cadilla etc. The top roles offered were that of Marketing representative, sales executive, customer service executive etc.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms were well-equipped with modern infrastructure. The labs had all the amenities required with proper tools and equipments. The library consists of all the study materials and books needed for the course. Hostel rooms are spacious, but cleanliness is a matter of concern. The food is not very good, it's still edible. Canteen is huge and serves a variety of dishes. There is a dispensary in the campus as well to give medical attention to those in need. There is a National level stadium in the campus with exposure to sports equipments to make sure that all the necessities to navigate the sports and games are met.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The campus life is fine. Students have to follow a set of guidelines such as attendance, etc.

content.Placements: In this college, placements are average. The minimum salary package offered ranges between 3 LPA to 4 LPA. Teachers work with students to get placements in good companies. Almost 50% of students are placed.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was good. It provides a canteen, ground, and stadium. Our college arranges various tournaments for students. The hostel facilities are very good.
content.Faculty: Teachers are excellent and supportive. They clear all students' doubts and provide mentorship to students for any problem in career or personal. All teachers are well qualified. They are very friendly with students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Anand college of pharmacy.

content.Placements: The placements for this course are average. They are neither good nor bad. The average placement of pharmacy is about 2.2 to 3.3 LPA. The fee of the college is 1 lakh 19 thousand with bus. The college is good.
content.Infrastructure: Very good infrastructure and hostel facility. There are both separate hotels, i.e. girls and boys. The girl’s hostel name is sharda hastel. The boy’s hostel name is Vivekanand hostel. The seniors are very supportive. The infrastructure of the college is very good.
content.Faculty: The faculty is experienced and the educated faculty members focus mainly on clearing concepts. Most of the faculty has done M.Pharma and they guide students on how to perform that particular practical. They mainly focus on the concepts and the core of the pharmacy.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: Around 50% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA, the average salary package offered is 3 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Sun Pharma, Torrent pharmaceuticals limited, and Cipla are the top recruiting companies that come to hire candidates from our course. Almost 25 % of students got internships from Torrent Pharma, Sun Pharma, and Dr. Reddy's pharmaceuticals. Pharmacists, Quality control, Drug inspector, Food inspector, and much more are the job opportunities we get.
content.Infrastructure: We have a good infrastructure in my hostel and classroom. All areas of the hostel, classrooms, library, labs and toilets are well cleaned and hygienic. Wi-Fi facilities are available in the hostel and college building. The hotel has a good infrastructure and strictly raging prohibited areas having our hostel warden. The canteen and mess also are well and cleaned area having top to average quality of food available.

faqs.answer:
Anand College of Pharmacy has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityD.PharmaThe minimum age is 14 years as on 1st July 2022, i.e. born on or before 01-07-2009.B.PharmaCandidate must have passed 10+2 or its equivalent with Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics / Biology from any recognised Board / University and must have secured above mentioned marks in aggregate in mandatory subjects. 
Result awaited students can also apply on provisional basis.

reviews.review_heading: This college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure and facilities like Wi-Fi, library, neat and clean classrooms and separate labs for each subject. I like hostel facilities and a hygienic mess and canteen. They provide hygienic food. Outdoor as well as indoor games and a big playground are available.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied by the infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Conveniently located cafes and mini refreshment joints are popular gathering places for students, faculty, and staff to eat, study, or socialize with friends. Anand college provides a student with an environment to enjoy the fast paced metro lifestyle right within the campus. Restaurants and cafes operational on campus are Lord's food court, cafe coffee day, baskin & robbins and subway.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good.
reviews.review_text: Our college has all facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and a library. Good enough and fair quality of food is served in our college canteen and mess. There are good medical facilities, also a huge playground (which is like a stadium) and proper playing equipment.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is also good here, and I am happy with this college. The atmosphere and facilities are also good, and sports activities are very nice and good. There is a super canteen, and only good hygienic food is provided. Medical facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied in terms of infrastructure and faculty but not in terms of placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is provided in the computer labs. There is a library having maximum books related to our subject. Our college had a regular session for games like cricket, basketball, volleyball, badminton, football, etc. The canteen offered very tasty food, and some of its items were chilli potato, spring roll, and egg roll. Everything is good in college, but monkeys create menace here.

reviews.review_heading: Anand College of Pharmacy is good for the students of pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: The college has the best infrastructure when compared to other colleges in north India. The college has good labs, and the campus is eco-friendly. The college has a national level stadium, and a cafeteria is also available on the campus. The campus is connected with national highway and just 18 kilometres far from Agra city. Keetham lake behind the campus is widely distributed on both sides for around 10 kilometres.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is good, and there is a huge pavilion end stadium among the colleges in Asia.
reviews.review_text: The one thing that I like in this college is its modern technology. The college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, projectors, advanced labs, and well- maintained classrooms. The students are provided smart cards with a barcode on it. The college has canteen facilities, and there are two canteens available in the college. The canteens are well-cleaned and spacious.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the placements of the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. The internal committee of the college is growing nowadays. The college is good regarding the studies and the environment. The hostel facilities provided are good. The infrastructure of the college is at par when compared to other colleges in the city.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members were good and satisfactory. Placements in 2017 were really good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Anand is really very superb. All the facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, Library, medical facilities, sports and games are available on the campus. Labs and classrooms are really good. Canteen food is also delicious. I was a hosteller, and almost all the facilities were available in the hostel. I didn't face any issues regarding the infrastructure during my tenure at the college.

reviews.review_heading: The best pharmacy college with the best knowledge, placements, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities provided in the campus are good. The college has the best labs, and they are maintained in the proper way. The college has the best sports stadium. There are healthy gatherings and joy in all the students. All the courses regarding our future are available in the same campus with the same atmosphere.

college_info.intro:
Chanakya University Bangalore Campus popular programmes are BTech, BSc, and MBA. Chanakya University in Bangalore MBA students can become Managers, Team Leaders, or can go for various other job profiles. Chanakya University Bangalore students are taught by experienced faculty members. Chanakya University faculty come from international universities, leading corporates & Indian Institutions. MBA students are taught Integral Economic Philosophy, Quantitative & Qualitative Research Methods, and various other subjects.
Chanakya University Bangalore BTech students are taught the Foundation in Engineering Sciences, Mathematics, and Ethics, Theory of Computation, and several other subjects. BTech students can become Software Developers, Database Administrators, Software Engineers, or can go for various other job profiles. review_summary.college_name: Chanakya University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BBA (Hons) in Business Analytics - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the university is really nice.

content.Placements: Our university is relatively new, so placements are still being developed. However, the board members are really supportive and dedicated. I'm confident that they'll offer us great and amazing opportunities with industry connections and skill-building initiatives.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure so far is really nice, but it is still under construction. The hostel rooms are really nice and clean. Also, the mess food is decent. They have amazing sports facilities. The classrooms are excellent and equipped with digital tools.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering (VLSI and Embbeded System) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is really good college.

content.Placements: 80 percent of students are placed. 15 LPA is the highest package, 5 LPA is the lowest package, and the average package is 12 LPA. Tata and Pure Storage are the top recruiting companies. In our course, we still have not got any internship, but looking forward to getting it. VLSI engineer and chip designer are the roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: We have a well-maintained library, labs, and classrooms, and very good Wi-Fi connectivity. In the hostel, the quality of food is very good. There are many sports facilities for students, and medical facilities are available for all students in college.

paragraphs: Chanakya University admissionsare entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Chanakya University is as per the steps below:

The mode of application is online. Students need to apply at the official website, i.e., https://admissions.chanakyauniversity.in/pg-application-form., for admission to the various programme. The application fee is INR 1,000. Candidates can fill out the application form on the university's official website.
The university admits students based on Chanakya University Pravesha Pareeksha/CAT/MAT/XAT/GMAT/ATMA/CUPP. It also considers the students academic performance for final selection.

Once done with the exam scores the University conducts PI for the candidates. Aspirants with scores equal or above the cutoff are offered seats. The university also releases a merit list based on the composite scores of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted students need to come for verification of documents and pay theChanakya University feeto confirm their seats in the university.

college_info.college_name: Chanakya University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Chanakya University has released its concession policy for the Academic Year 2025-26. The University offers fee concessions to students based on different eligibility criteria. Merit-based scholarships are only available for direct admission candidates (paying the full fee). The University offers these scholarships for eligible students of first-year. To prove the eligibility criteria, students must provide supporting documents and an application form. Enlisted below are the Chanakya University Scholarships for Academic Year 2025-26:
Chanakya University offers merit-based scholarships to UG programme students with different eligibility criteria. Candidates must secure the below-mentioned scores and secure a scholarship:

Similarly, Chanakya University offers PG Programme Merit-Based Concessions on the basis of courses such as MBA and other PG-level programmes. The eligibility criteria require candidates to secure valid scores in previous qualifying examinations. Below is the list of the qualification criteria along with the concession amount:

Chanakya University offers means-based scholarships to candidates belonging to different criteria such as wards of Defence Serving and Retired/ Serving Police personnel, single parent (mother only), state-level sports person, national-level sports person, orphans and physically challenged. The eligibility criteria include a minimum aggregate of 50% to 70%. The scholarship values from INR 25K to 25% or 50% relaxation in tuition fee. However, the scholarship amount varies for the Physically Challenged Students.

Chanakya University offers a concession to candidates pursuing UG or PG-level courses. To be eligible for the Chanakya University admission process, for majority of courses, candidates are required to appear for the CUET entrance exam. Valid scores in the CUET examination are further required to qualify for the scholarship criteria, offering a concession to eligible candidates scoring 85% to 95% plus.
To learn more about the Chanakya University Scholarship 2025-26, check out the brochure attached here: Download

college_info.intro:
SCSVMV popular Programmes are BTech and MBA. BTech students are placed in top companies and top sectors such as Accenture, Cognizant, and others. SCSVMV University BTech students can join government organisations such as Indian Railways, ISRO, ONGC, and others. The salary offered to the BTech students is quite satisfactory and is as per the market standards.
SCSVMV's MBA students can find jobs in the Marketing, Finance, HR Management, and Supply Chain Management sectors. faqs.answer: A:    SCSVMV University accepts MAT, XAT, CAT, ATMA, and other scores for admission to MBA. The university also conducts its own entrance exam for MBA admission.The minimum marks required for MBA at Sri Chandrasekharendra Saraswathi Viswa Mahavidyalaya (SCSVMV) in 2024 is a recognised undergraduate degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate marks.
faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores does SCSVMV accept for admission to MBA?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Sri Chandrasekharendra Saraswathi Viswa Mahavidyalaya (SCSVMV) accepts JEE Main scores for admission to its B.E./B.Tech programs. Candidates seeking admission can apply with their JEE Main scores or Uni-Gauge-E scores. SCSVMV also conducts its own entrance exam called AISEEE/ERA Uni-Gauge for admission to B.E./B.Tech programs.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: College is good but they have to develop the infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: 70-85% of students are getting placements who are studying in this college. The highest package of this college is nearly 10 LPA. Here you can study without paying a single rupee by playing the games if you are joining in the departments other than Engineering.
review_content.Infrastructure: Some facilities are good while some are average. There is no Wi-Fi provided in classes or library or labs. In hostel, Wi-Fi is provided but it does not work properly. Food in the canteen is good but somewhat expensive as compared to outside.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The college should improve placements.

review_content.Placements: 38% of students are placed in our course. It is not actively done by the placement offices. The highest package is INR 5 LPA, and the lowest package is INR 2 LPA. The top recruiting companies are TCS, Accenture, Wipro, Cognizant, and other small companies that also provide placement for students in our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, classroom, labs, library, workshop, seminar hall, projectors, practical sessions, etc. are there. Hostel facilities are not bad, and fees are acceptable. Medical facilities are good. Sports and games are also encouraged at our college. Sports like volleyball, basketball, cricket, etc. have active participation in our college.

faqs.answer: It is possible to get admission in SCSVMV for B.Tech with 45-50 % in Class 12th, but it is not a guarantee. The admission process for SCSVMV University is based on the entrance exam or merit in the qualifying exams. Scores of CBSE 12th are accepted for B.Tech admission. Candidates must have passed 10+2 examination with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects, and obtained at least 50% Marks (40% marks for candidates belonging to reserved category)
faqs.question: Q: Can I get admission in SCSVMV for B.Tech with 60% in Class 12th?

faqs.answer: Sri Chandrasekharendra Saraswathi Viswa Mahavidyalaya (SCSVMV) accepts the following entrance exam scores for admission:For B.E./B.Tech: AISEEE/ERA Uni-Gauge exam conducted by the university or JEE Main score is acceptedFor other courses like MBA, M.Phil, Ph.D., and BAMS: CAT, MAT, XAT, ATMA, JMAT, and scores in the test conducted by SCSVMV University are acceptedThese are the main entrance exam scores accepted by SCSVMV for admission into various programs.

review_summary.college_name: SCSVMV Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Overall the college is very good.

content.Placements: 90 percentage of students are placed in my course. 40 LPA is the highest, 7 LPA is the lowest, 9 to 10 LPA is average package for my course. Amazon, AutoDesk, Flipkart etc. are top recruiting companies. 90 percentage students got internship for my course in Amazon, Tech Mahindra are companies.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities available in my course are very good like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms. The library in our college is very good and the books facilities are like research, articles, programming and coding books etc. The quality of food is good in our hostel. In the hostel there are medical facilities, gym, indoor games, and etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and I recommend others to join the college.

content.Placements: I am in ECE. About 40% of students got placed. Some local companies visit the college. More than 50% of students got internships from this college. When you compare it with other colleges, you can always see the numbers are low. But when the company comes and you get placed, you will get a job guarantee. Top companies visit the college.
content.Infrastructure: There is good infrastructure because of the library and other departments. I can't say it is awesome but I like it. The infrastructure of the library is always good. When you come to the ECE department, toilets are good. The gym and hostel are very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College is good but they have to develop the infrastructure.

content.Placements: 70-85% of students are getting placements who are studying in this college. The highest package of this college is nearly 10 LPA. Here you can study without paying a single rupee by playing the games if you are joining in the departments other than Engineering.
content.Infrastructure: Some facilities are good while some are average. There is no Wi-Fi provided in classes or library or labs. In hostel, Wi-Fi is provided but it does not work properly. Food in the canteen is good but somewhat expensive as compared to outside.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The college should improve placements.

content.Placements: 38% of students are placed in our course. It is not actively done by the placement offices. The highest package is INR 5 LPA, and the lowest package is INR 2 LPA. The top recruiting companies are TCS, Accenture, Wipro, Cognizant, and other small companies that also provide placement for students in our course.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, classroom, labs, library, workshop, seminar hall, projectors, practical sessions, etc. are there. Hostel facilities are not bad, and fees are acceptable. Medical facilities are good. Sports and games are also encouraged at our college. Sports like volleyball, basketball, cricket, etc. have active participation in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Disappointed with the placements.

content.Placements: 35% of students were placed in our batch. INR 5 LPA is the highest package, and INR 2 LPA is the lowest package in our course. Accenture, Cognizant, Wipro, TCS, etc. and other small companies offer placements. 40% of students got internships. Software developed, associate engineer, data analyst, etc. are the top roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, libraries, seminar halls, workshops, libraries, projectors, and computers are available. Food quality is average. Medical facilities were good. And sports and games also provide good participation and encouragement for students. Cricket, basketball, volleyball, and other games are encouraged.

admission_overview.college_name: SCSVMV Admission 2025: Eligibility, Application Process, Fees

paragraphs: SCSVMV University admission is open for all the courses. The university offers UG and PG programmes specialised in Engineering, Commerce, Business administration and others.SCSVMV Universityconducted an online mode of application. Admission to all the courses is both merit entrance based. Applicants looking for admission to the university can apply online through the official website of SCSVMV University. To know more about the SCSVMV Kanchi University admission process along

SCSVMV Kanchi University offers entrance and merit-based admission to all its courses. Admission to all UG and PG courses is open. Candidates who meet the minimum eligibility criteria for the respective course will have to appear for the entrance exam for admission to BTech, BSc, BAMS, MD, BBA and others. Further, the university also offers merit-based admission to some courses based on last qualifying exam scores. The table below lists courses offered at SCSVMV Kanchi University courses eligibility along with their accepted entrance exams, & selection process:

Check here for more details aboutSCSVMV Kanchi University courses

SCSVMV Kanchi University admission process 2025is open. The college accepts various entrance exam scores such as CUET/MAT/CAT/ATMA/NEET and others for admission toBTech, MBA, BCA and other courses. Further, for admission to other courses, the university offers merit-based ad admission.. Check below the step-by-stepSCSVMV Kanchi Universityadmission process:
Step 1: SCSVMV Kanchi University Application Process 2025

The eligible candidates need to apply online on the official website of Sanjivani University. It must be noted that the eligible candidates must have completed theentrance examformalities & must have qualified the eligibility criteria for their respective courses before applying to the University.
Step 2: SCSVMV Kanchi University Selection Process 2025

Admission to the courses is both merit andentrance-based. The institute has a predefined selection process for shortlisting aspirants. The selection process includes an entrance exam for admission to BTech, BBA, MBA, BAMS and others. Further, for other courses university offers merit-based admission.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
After candidates get shortlisted, they need to come for the document verification. Selected candidates need to pay a course fee to confirm their admission.

faqs.question: Does SCSVMV accept JEE score?
faqs.answer: Yes, Sri Chandrasekharendra Saraswathi Viswa Mahavidyalaya (SCSVMV) accepts JEE Main scores for admission to its B.E./B.Tech programs. Candidates seeking admission can apply with their JEE Main scores or Uni-Gauge-E scores. SCSVMV also conducts its own entrance exam called AISEEE/ERA Uni-Gauge for admission to B.E./B.Tech programs.

faqs.question: When are SCSVMV application forms out?
faqs.answer: The SCSVMV application forms for the academic session 2024-25 have been released for UG and PG courses. The application forms can be filled in online and offline mode.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for B.Tech at SCSVMV?
faqs.answer: The seat intake for B.Tech at Sri Chandrasekharendra Saraswathi Viswa Mahavidyalaya (SCSVMV) University is 270. The SCSVMV application forms for the academic session 2024-25 for UG and PG courses. The application forms can be filled in online and offline mode. Students should visit the official website of the college for the latest information about the admsiion process.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores are accepted by SCSVMV for admission?
faqs.answer: Sri Chandrasekharendra Saraswathi Viswa Mahavidyalaya (SCSVMV) accepts the following entrance exam scores for admission:For B.E./B.Tech: AISEEE/ERA Uni-Gauge exam conducted by the university or JEE Main score is acceptedFor other courses like MBA, M.Phil, Ph.D., and BAMS: CAT, MAT, XAT, ATMA, JMAT, and scores in the test conducted by SCSVMV University are acceptedThese are the main entrance exam scores accepted by SCSVMV for admission into various programs.

placement_data.title: SCSVMV Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: As per Sri Chandrasekharendra Saraswathi Viswa Mahavidyalaya NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during UG 3-year , UG 4-year and UG 5-year placements 2023 stood at INR 2.5 LPA , INR 6 LPA and INR 6 LPA , respectively. Further, the median package offered during PG 2-year and PG 3-year placements 2023 stood at INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA , respectively.

Earlier, the highest package offered during SCSVMV Kanchi University BTech placements 2023 stood at INR 6.5 LPA . Further, leading companies such as Accenture, Cognizant and Hexaware Technologies visited the campus during SCSVMV Kanchi University placements 2023. Other than this, according to Sri Chandrasekharendra Saraswathi Viswa Mahavidyalaya NIRF report 2023, the median package offered during SCSVMV Kanchi University UG 4-year and PG 2-year placements 2022 stood at INR 4.00 LPA and INR 2.50 LPA, respectively.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college is very good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available in my course are very good like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms. The library in our college is very good and the books facilities are like research, articles, programming and coding books etc. The quality of food is good in our hostel. In the hostel there are medical facilities, gym, indoor games, and etc.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and I recommend others to join the college.
reviews.review_text: There is good infrastructure because of the library and other departments. I can't say it is awesome but I like it. The infrastructure of the library is always good. When you come to the ECE department, toilets are good. The gym and hostel are very good.

reviews.review_heading: College is good but they have to develop the infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Some facilities are good while some are average. There is no Wi-Fi provided in classes or library or labs. In hostel, Wi-Fi is provided but it does not work properly. Food in the canteen is good but somewhat expensive as compared to outside.

reviews.review_heading: The college should improve placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, classroom, labs, library, workshop, seminar hall, projectors, practical sessions, etc. are there. Hostel facilities are not bad, and fees are acceptable. Medical facilities are good. Sports and games are also encouraged at our college. Sports like volleyball, basketball, cricket, etc. have active participation in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Disappointed with the placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, libraries, seminar halls, workshops, libraries, projectors, and computers are available. Food quality is average. Medical facilities were good. And sports and games also provide good participation and encouragement for students. Cricket, basketball, volleyball, and other games are encouraged.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for students in this locality, but I would not recommend it for others.
reviews.review_text: The iconic part of the college was the central library. It was huge. You can also see some ancient books and antiques. The campus was good with average greenery. Recently, there was renovation work. Now, it's much better. Hostels were good, but fees were high after renovation. Wi-Fi was provided only for laptops. Labs were fine.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college as I got everything I expected, including good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was quite enough for students. Every classroom had a projector. Our college had a huge library with all kinds of books, from curriculum-related books to novels. It had a good hostel. The quality of the food was good. It had a huge ground to place every sport and game like cricket, football, basketball, and Kabaddi. We also played indoor games like table tennis and chess.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend students to join this college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms were good. The library was good. The mess was not that good. Wi-Fi was also not good. Labs were not that advanced. Lab assistants were fine.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Chandrasekharendra Saraswathi Viswa Mahavidyalaya.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was available throughout the campus. Our labs and classroom were good and well-furnished. The library had over 100,000 books. The hostel was good. The quality of food in the mess was good. The canteen was excellent. Medical facilities were available. Sports and games were very important in college.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college is average. Because this college is not familiar in kanchipuram also.
reviews.review_text: In my department, we have the best computer lab facility with high speed internet. We have average classrooms, seminar hall, mini department libraries and a big college Library. Hostel facility is good. The quality of food is good only and it is vegetarian. A medical center is available. Playground and gym are available.

reviews.review_heading: It is an affordable college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are quite good, but not worth it for the given fees. The infrastructure of SJSCAH is not good because it has only a single building named both the administrative block and the academic block, which also includes small rooms as departments.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Chandrasekharendra Saraswathi Viswa Mahavidyalaya University.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available. Classrooms are good and comfortable. The hostel is better than before. Ayurvedic medicines are provided as treatment. The canteen is good. Sports and games are encouraged. The ground is good for playing. The infrastructure is good and they are making it better. The library is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Very good placement in our university. Very good infrastructure. Faculty is good
reviews.review_text: Very good facilities and infrastructure in our university. The Wi-Fi facility is good. Library facility is good. Labs are very clean and rooms are air conditioned. Medical facilities are available inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Somewhat good about studies and placements in CSE but not good for some branches.
reviews.review_text: Our campus had no Wi-Fi. Classrooms were good and the library was wonderful. There were good labs but the presentation of the equipment was less. When strength is more, it is not enough. Students are divided into two batches. There were hostels at our university. The hostel was good and served better food.

reviews.review_heading: Years becomes days at SCSVMU.
reviews.review_text: Our college had a decent environment and good infrastructure. Course wise, we were upgraded a lot but still, need changes in the style of exams and others. All our classrooms were equipped with smart class systems. It was a very clean and eco-friendly environment. We had good sports facilities.

highlights.summary: College of Health Science, Vidya Jyoti Educational Society is a private institute in Derabassi, Punjab. At the UG, PG and Certificate levels, the institute offers 12 courses across 6 specialisations in Full Time mode. The popular College of Health Science, Vidya Jyoti Educational Society programs include B.Sc., M.Sc., UG Diploma and Certificate. College of Health Science, Vidya Jyoti Educational Society courses are provided in several streams including Medicine & Health Sciences and Science, etc. The fees at College of Health Science, Vidya Jyoti Educational Society ranges between INR 57,000 to 93,000 for the different courses. faqs.question: How is the placement facility at Gourishankar Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research?

faqs.answer: A:    Gourishankar Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research offers median package range of INR 141,667 during in-campus placements. It has a decent placement assistance program and has been rated 4 on placements as per Shiksha verified reviews by students.
faqs.question: What is the median package offered at Gourishankar Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research during placements?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Gourishankar Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in stream like Medicine & Health Sciences, and have a fee structure of around INR 1,94,642 to 3,45,324. UG programs include B.Pharma. Further, the PG programs include M.Pharma.

faqs.answer:
A:    Gourishankar Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.PharmaCandidate must have studied Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects along with one of the Mathematics/Biology subjects with above mentioned marks in the above subjects taken together from any recognised Board/Council.
The mentioned marks of SC/ST and OBC is for the candidate belonging to maharashtra State.
Candidates who are appearing at the qualifying examination are also eligible.

Maharashtra State candidates must have to appear for MHTCET. All India Candidates need to appear for MHTCET/NEET. highlights.summary:
The Knights of Safety Academy creates free online training courses on health, safety, and compliance. These certified courses provide lessons on home safety, occupational safety, chemical safety, COVID-19, mental health, and more. Each course is developed with the expertise of our very own Knights of Safety – experts in their industries who are willing to share their knowledge and experience with over 100,000 students. Completely free, these online courses aim to promote better information on safety across various industries.

The Knights of Safety Academy makes free internet instructional classes on health, and safety. These certified courses give examples on home security, home safety, occupational safety, chemical safety, COVID-19, mental health, and more. Each course is created with the expertise of our own personal Knights of Safety - specialists in their enterprises who are willing to impart their insight and experience to more than 100,000 understudies. Totally free, these internet-based courses mean to advance better data on wellbeing across different businesses.

review_content.Placements: 80% of the students were placed in our course. The highest package offered was 1000000, and the lowest package offered was 300000. The top recruiting companies for our course are Wipro, Persistence, Pega, etc. 90% of students got internships from our courses in Pega, Persistence, Sabudh, and BJS.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is very good infrastructure for students, like smart boards and a library full of knowledgeable books. The university provides us wi-fi for practical and hands-on work. The food provided is good, and there are also vending machines and two canteens in the hostel.

review_content.Placements: Many students are placed in this course. The highest package for the student is 10 lacs, and the lowest package for the student is 3 lacs at our university. Two or more students are placed in Pega and Wipro, and five or six students are placed in Subudh for an internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classroom facilities are Wi-Fi, a smart TV, a computer in the labs and a library. The hostel facilities are a lift in the hostel, a canteen, a games room and a gym. The quality of mess food and canteen snacks is good. Medical facilities are good.

review_summary.college_name: Eternal University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the facility and free environment.

content.Placements: The highest package is 200,000 (presumably per annum), and the lowest must be 137,750 for B.Sc. Nursing. They have collaborations with foreign universities like Drexel and others. They provide placement to Vedanta Hospital Delhi. All students get placement, with 50% being the lowest score. Internships should be in IGMC Shimla for 6 months.
content.Infrastructure: They provide the best facilities and a free environment to live. As it is the 1st girls' private university of Himachal Pradesh, there is a protective environment for girls. They have good lab facilities and 2 libraries in the university, with proper ventilation. Classrooms are big and well-ventilated. Facilities provided in the hostel are also very good; food is good, and the canteen facility is awesome. They have their own hospitality for further practices during clinical duties. Games and other curricular activities are also performed in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Excellent University-A hub for academic excellence.

content.Placements: Students with a percentage more than 60 % were placed in our course. The highest package is 10 LPA and the lowest is 5 LPA. The companies Recruiting are Microsoft, Wipro, etc. Our course lets the students gain more and more practical knowledge and hence they learn more.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very nice. It is a cool building. There are labs in our college with computers and wi-fi is available 24 hours. The mess food is very healthy and there are canteens in our hostel. In our university, there are sports events conducted every Saturday and also there are sports days in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Eternal University Baru Sahib- The divine valley of peace.

content.Placements: 80% of the students were placed in our course. The highest package offered was 1000000, and the lowest package offered was 300000. The top recruiting companies for our course are Wipro, Persistence, Pega, etc. 90% of students got internships from our courses in Pega, Persistence, Sabudh, and BJS.
content.Infrastructure: There is very good infrastructure for students, like smart boards and a library full of knowledgeable books. The university provides us wi-fi for practical and hands-on work. The food provided is good, and there are also vending machines and two canteens in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Eternal University College: A platform for professional development.

content.Placements: Many students are placed in this course. The highest package for the student is 10 lacs, and the lowest package for the student is 3 lacs at our university. Two or more students are placed in Pega and Wipro, and five or six students are placed in Subudh for an internship.
content.Infrastructure: The classroom facilities are Wi-Fi, a smart TV, a computer in the labs and a library. The hostel facilities are a lift in the hostel, a canteen, a games room and a gym. The quality of mess food and canteen snacks is good. Medical facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech. Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: The environment of this college is good and peaceful.

content.Placements: Around 70% of students are placed. The lowest salary package offered is 3.5 LPA. The highest salary package offered is 4.7 LPA. Recruiting companies are Wipro, TCS, Persistent, and Luminous. Almost 70% of students got internships in companies like Wipro and Excellence. The role offered is engineer and associated engineer.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities like Wi-Fi, laboratories, laptops, library and sports kits are provided by this college. The facilities in our hostel are excellent, food is also good and healthy. In covid food is provided in our rooms due to precautions. The medical facilities are good. The sports and games are also excellent in this college.

admission_overview.college_name: Eternal University Admission 2025: Fee, Eligibility, Selection Criteria

paragraphs: Eternal University admissionsare both merit and entrance-based. The university accepts national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, CAT, XAT, GATE, HPCET, etc. for admission to specific courses. The university offers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels in multiple streams such as Engineering, Management, Arts, Science, etc. Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can apply online forEternal University admissions.
Eternal Universityoffers courses in full-time mode. Candidates must apply online for the course of their choice. Below are the keyEternal University admission highlights:
Particulars
Eternal University Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
Ongoing:UG, PG & Doctoral
UG courses:INR 95,000 - INR 3.3 lakh
PG courses:INR 85,000 - INR 1.6 lakh
How to apply?
https://eternaluniversity.edu.in/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

Eternal University offers admission to most of the courses based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Candidates also need to fulfil the eligibility requirements set for their course. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas, graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. Below is the eligibility and selection criteria for topEternal University courses:

Eternal University fee is a sum of various components such as tuition, caution deposit, hostel fee, etc. A one-time fee is added only to the first-year fee and for all other semesters, candidates will need to pay the tuition fee. Fee is a primary concern for aspirants when taking admission in a university. Candidates must check the scholarships available for the students to avail financial benefits. Below are popularEternal University feesand average package for top courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
Eternal University seat intake varies course-wise. Candidates can get a seat in the university based on their merit or entrance exam score. Below is the seat intake for popular EU courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
The university reserves some seats for reserved category candidates. The reservation is as per the state policy. Below is category-wise seat reservation for Eternal University:

Eternal University admission process starts with registration followed by selection rounds. Admissions in Eternal University usually begin in January every year. Below are the steps to get a seat in the university:
Step 1: Eternal University Application Process 2025

The mode of application is both online and offline. Candidates can fill out the application form available on the official website of university or download it for offline submission. Aspirants are also required to upload the specified documents during the application process.
Step 2: Selection

Eternal University selects candidates for most of the courses based on merit in the last qualifying exam. The university accepts JEE Main, GATE, CAT, MAT, XAT, etc. for admission to specific courses. Eternal University conducts an entrance exam for admission to BSc Nursing, BSc Agriculture, BTech Food Technology and all PhD courses. The university conducts personal interview for admission to a few courses.
Steps 3: Admission Confirmation

Once the student gets confirmation from the admission cell, he or she will submit the admission form along with all the relevant documents in-person or via online mode. Aspirants need to pay a minimum of 50% of total fee package at the time of document submission for admission.

faqs.question: Is Eternal University BSc admission merit-based or entrance-based?
faqs.answer: Eternal University BScHonsadmissionare both merit-based as well as entrance-based for the academic year 2025. The BSc programme offered by the University is a three-year, full-time programme whose admission is based on marks obtained by candidates in the qualifying examination plus the University conducts its own entrance examination for BSc Hons in Agriculture and BSc in Nursing programmes.

faqs.question: Are class 12th marks enough for Eternal University's BSc admission?
faqs.answer: Eternal University BSc course admissionsare both merit-based and entrance-based. Candidates who have passed the Class 12 or equivalent examination in Science stream with relevant subjects with minimum 50% aggregate can apply for admission to the BSc Hons at Eternal University in most of the specialisations. However, the University conducts its own entrance examination for BSc Hons in Agriculture and BSc in Nursing programmes.

courses_data.name: Eternal University BTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Eternal University offers four-year BTech spread across eight semesters. The university offers BTech inComputer Science EngineeringandFood Technology. The selection for BTech CSE will be based on HP CET or JEE Main score. The university conducts an entrance exam for admission to BTech Food Technology. Candidates must complete Class 12 to apply for any of the BTech specialisations.

faqs.question: Is BTech available at Eternal University?
faqs.answer: Eternal University offers four-year BTech divided into eight semesters. The university offers BTech in Computer Science Engineering and Food Technology. Candidates must complete Class 12 in Physics, Chemistry, Biology (PCB) orPhysics, Chemistry,Mathematics(PCM) or Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics,Biology(PCMB) with at least 50% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST) can apply for Eternal University BTech Food Technology. For CSE, candidates must pass Class 12 with at least 45% aggregate.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for BTech at Eternal University?
faqs.answer: Eternal University selects candidates for CSE based on JEE (Main) with 15% marks for general category and 10% marks for reserved category or HPCET with 20% marks for general category and 15% marks for reserved category. For CSE admission, the university conducts an entrance exam. Besides, aspirants must also meet the eligibility requirement for admission to BTech course.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for BTech at Eternal University?
faqs.answer: Candidates must pass Class 12 with Physics,Chemistry, Biology (PCB) or Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics (PCM) or Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, Biology (PCMB) with at least 50% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST) to apply for Eternal University BTech Food Technology. For CSE, candidates must pass Class 12 with at least 45% aggregate.

Aspirants must complete graduation to apply for MBA.

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores does Eternal University accept for admission to MBA?
faqs.answer: Eternal University accepts national-level entrance exams such as CAT, MAT, XAT or CMAT for admission to MBA programme. Candidates selected based on their entrance exam score are further called for a personal interview round. Aspirants also need to fulfil the eligibility criteria for MBA admission. The minimum criteria is bachelor's degree with at least 50% aggregate for MBA.

qs_world.description:
Considering the aggregate score, Eternal University has been placed in a good position by the QS World University Rankings 2023 under the 'Asia' category. By the provided parameters such as Faculty Quality Weightage and Employability Weightage, the college is ranked well when compared with other universities It has been noted that in the 'Asia' category the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2023, Eternal University fell 50 ranks to #651 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. It has been seen that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'Top Global Universities' category as compared to the QS World University Rankings of preceding years. In 2024, Eternal University fell 300 ranks to #951 rank in the 'Top Global Universities' category by the QS World University Rankings. reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the facility and free environment.
reviews.review_text: They provide the best facilities and a free environment to live. As it is the 1st girls' private university of Himachal Pradesh, there is a protective environment for girls. They have good lab facilities and 2 libraries in the university, with proper ventilation. Classrooms are big and well-ventilated. Facilities provided in the hostel are also very good; food is good, and the canteen facility is awesome. They have their own hospitality for further practices during clinical duties. Games and oth...

reviews.review_heading: Excellent University-A hub for academic excellence.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very nice. It is a cool building. There are labs in our college with computers and wi-fi is available 24 hours. The mess food is very healthy and there are canteens in our hostel. In our university, there are sports events conducted every Saturday and also there are sports days in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Eternal University Baru Sahib- The divine valley of peace.
reviews.review_text: There is very good infrastructure for students, like smart boards and a library full of knowledgeable books. The university provides us wi-fi for practical and hands-on work. The food provided is good, and there are also vending machines and two canteens in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Eternal University College: A platform for professional development.
reviews.review_text: The classroom facilities are Wi-Fi, a smart TV, a computer in the labs and a library. The hostel facilities are a lift in the hostel, a canteen, a games room and a gym. The quality of mess food and canteen snacks is good. Medical facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: The environment of this college is good and peaceful.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities like Wi-Fi, laboratories, laptops, library and sports kits are provided by this college. The facilities in our hostel are excellent, food is also good and healthy. In covid food is provided in our rooms due to precautions. The medical facilities are good. The sports and games are also excellent in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college gives peaceful environment and great guidance.
reviews.review_text: There are labs for each subject, free Wi-Fi, and a good library with books related to the course. A high-quality hostel environment and food are provided. Friendly warden and a security guard with minimum problems.

reviews.review_heading: The industrial mentorship program is the best thing here.
reviews.review_text: The university has a good infrastructure. The labs have ample computers. The library staff is amazing, and you can use library books to study. I have lived in many PGs and hostels but the food served here is the best. You get hot water daily in the morning for the whole year. On weekends we used to go to Apple a Day (Restaurant on the campus) for special meals. Hostel rooms and washrooms are cleaned every day. There are no complaints in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides the best faculty and infrastructure. It provides 100% placements.
reviews.review_text: Labs are fully equipped with the modern tools and technology required. There are LAN cables in each lab that are 24x7 active. The facility of smart classes is also provided with fully trained faculty. There are dedicated programming boot camps for 6 months. The hostel feels like home. The quality of the food served is far much better than any other hostel food. We never faced any problems with the hostel food ever. The medical facilities are up to the mark. There is a hospital on the campus only...

reviews.review_heading: It feels like home but sometimes due to too many restrictions, we miss our home too.
reviews.review_text: We have a library, canteen, and sports facilities like hockey, basketball, volleyball, table tennis, lawn tennis, and badminton. There is a hospital in our locality run by the nursing college of our University. We do not have free Wi-Fi but they are working on it to avail the facility. As we are the first batch, hence we suffered the problems related to labs and lab equipment. Another building of Akal College of Agriculture is under construction.

reviews.review_heading: Good Environment, good teachers .
reviews.review_text: In hostel we get a good environment. We get good food. We are having good warden mam. We are having one canteen in our hostel. Here the labs are good. And classrooms are also good. We get many facilities. Hostel is also very good.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest not to waste 3-4 years here.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi for technology students at the campus or hostel. There is no exposure to the outside world. Students are not learning any skills that may be helpful for their careers. They just taught you to fixed subjects which are required to complete our graduation. The library doesn't have a sufficient number of books, and most of them are editions. Knowledge of emerging technologies is not provided.
