highlights.summary: Admission to Kadi Sarva Vishwavidyalaya is open for the year 2025. Candidates must visit the official website to apply for the same.

college_info.intro:
Kadi Sarva Vishwavidyalaya offers BSc, BTech and MBA as some of the popular programmes on the basis of entrance, in full-time mode. The University offers these courses with a minimum eligibility of Class 12 and graduation. In addition, candidates must secure valid scores in the accepted entrance exams such as CAT/ MAT/ CMAT/ JEE Main/ GUJCET/ GATE or other equivalent exams.
KSV Gandhinagar offers these courses with a total tuition fee varying from INR 1.6 Lakh to INR 4.8 Lakh, depending on the level and duration of the course. For more details on Kadi Sarva Vishwavidyalaya popular programmes, check out the table below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
It is a renowned educational institution and offers courses at UG and PG level. Some of the popular programmes include MBA/PGDM, BSc and MSc Kadi Sarva Vishwavidyalaya offers a total of 4 courses to students in 5 specialisations such as Computer Science, Finance, Human Resources, IT & Systems, and Sales & Marketing.

Admission to these courses is based on merit and valid entrance scores. The course is offered in full-time mode. The accepted entrance exam includes and other equivalent exams, varying as per the course opted for. Kadi Sarva Vishwavidyalaya courses are offered to students with a fee range of . In addition to this, the university has a total seat intake of students. For more details around KSV courses, fees and eligibility, check out the table below:

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: If the rank is <4000, don't take admission.

review_content.Placements: Not many students get placements because there are too many students, but the placement companies can only take 15-10% of students for jobs. If your goal is to get a placement or a good job, then it's not the correct place. The package is not good. The average package is 4-5 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not good. There is no infrastructure, it’s a very small college, and there are no good classrooms. There is no proper place to sit and enjoy college life with friends, no proper canteen, and no proper parking place. Infrastructure needs improvement and development.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Education (B. Ed.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is the only English medium B.Ed college in Gandhinagar.

review_content.Placements: Every year, many schools approach this college for placements like GSEB, ICSE, and CBSE. With this, new gates are open for us, and even before completing our course, we got a chance to go to many schools for a bridge course and observations. So we get experience of different schools.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is one school building in which Gujarati medium and English medium both have different classes and administration. The third floor has classes for B.Ed students, and on the second floor, we have an admin room, where we can meet our faculty members at any time. On the first floor, we have a computer lab.

review_summary.college_name: Kadi Sarva Vishwavidyalaya Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Value for money, college and placement.

content.Placements: There are approximately 70-80% placements in our college LDRP over the last 10 years. The highest package is 12 to 15 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average package is 7-8 LPA. The top recruitment companies are Infosys, TCS, HCL and many other well-known companies. Also, this company offers an internship based on the skills and the CGPA of the students. Around 50-60 % students got the opportunity. DSA specialists, data science, debugging and many other general roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Our LDRP college has many classrooms, a well-placed library with a huge space and many sources. College has its own Wi-Fi in all the college campus, which is not excellent but also not bad. And each and every subject has its own labs for practical and machine learning. In our college hostel, there are also a huge number of decent quality rooms, and the food is good and healthy. They also have medical facilities for the faculty and students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: My college was awesome, and I will never forget the experience.

content.Placements: 70% of students got placed in recruiting companies such as Tata, Bajaj, AU Bank, and H&H Pharma. The average package was 3-5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, AC classrooms, library, gym, garden, and computer labs were available. The canteen was excellent. The college infrastructure was definitely a plus.
content.Faculty: The teaching staff is familiar with students.
content.Other: I researched the college before choosing it, and my experience was awesome. The teaching style, facilities, and college festivals and programs were all great. It was an awesome and memorable time in my life. Anyone wanting to take admission should go for it. You will never regret it.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: If the rank is <4000, don't take admission.

content.Placements: Not many students get placements because there are too many students, but the placement companies can only take 15-10% of students for jobs. If your goal is to get a placement or a good job, then it's not the correct place. The package is not good. The average package is 4-5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not good. There is no infrastructure, it’s a very small college, and there are no good classrooms. There is no proper place to sit and enjoy college life with friends, no proper canteen, and no proper parking place. Infrastructure needs improvement and development.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Education (B. Ed.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is the only English medium B.Ed college in Gandhinagar.

content.Placements: Every year, many schools approach this college for placements like GSEB, ICSE, and CBSE. With this, new gates are open for us, and even before completing our course, we got a chance to go to many schools for a bridge course and observations. So we get experience of different schools.
content.Infrastructure: There is one school building in which Gujarati medium and English medium both have different classes and administration. The third floor has classes for B.Ed students, and on the second floor, we have an admin room, where we can meet our faculty members at any time. On the first floor, we have a computer lab.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College has supportive faculty, decent placements, good campus life, and improving infrastructure

content.Placements: Around 70-80% of students are placed. The highest package is ₹8 LPA, the lowest ₹2.5 LPA, and the average around ₹4.5 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, and Wipro. About 60% got internships at companies like IBM, HCL, and Tech Mahindra in roles like developer and analyst.
content.Infrastructure: Course offers good Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, and a well-resourced library, hostel facilities are decent, food in the mess is hygienic but basic, the canteen offers variety, medical aid is available, and there are sports and games facilities.

admission_overview.college_name: Kadi Sarva Vishwavidyalaya Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: Kadi Sarva Vishwavidyalaya admission 2025is primarily entrance-based. Students are accepted based on their performance in the national or state-level entrance exams. Also known asKSV Gandhinagar, the university offers a wide range of programmes in various fields, such as Engineering, Management, Pharmacy, Science, and more. The university offers these courses through its various constituent colleges. Students interested in getting into the courses offered at the university need to ensure that they satisfy the admission criteria for the same. Aspirants looking to join the university can read the following article to know all about the courses, eligibility criteria, and admission process forKadi Sarva Vishwavidyalaya.

Kadi Sarva Vishwavidyalaya course admissionis made on the basis of preset admission criteria. Students are required to satisfy it to be eligible for admission into whichever course they seek to pursue. Some of the popular programmes offered at the university are BSc, B.E, MSc, and MBA among others. To get into the undergraduate programmes, students need to pass Class 12 with relevant subjects, whereas PG admissions require students to pass graduation in a relevant field. Additionally, students may have to provide valid entrance exam scores, such as CAT, MAT, GUJCET, GATE, etc. Find below the eligibility and selection criteria for some of the popular programmes offered atKadi Sarva Vishwavidyalaya courses:
GUJCET+ ACPC counselling
GUJCET + ACPC

KSV Gandhinagar admissionis a multi-step process that requires students to complete an application followed by going through the selection process and leading the admission confirmation. The university admits students through ACPC for professional courses, while admission to other programmes is made based on the admission guidelines of the university itself. Interested students can follow the step-by-step KSV Gandhinagar admission process explained below:
Step 1: Application Process

Interested students can apply for the desired programme by registering on the admission portal of either the university or ACPC (whichever is applicable). Students need to duly fill out the application form by providing the required information and specified documents.
Step 2: Selection Process

Students are shortlisted based on either academic merit achieved in the last qualifying exam or the accepted entrance exam. For admission into the professional courses, students need to participate in ACPC counselling as the university follows the admission guidelines of the same. Some of the entrance exams accepted by the university include CAT/ MAT/ CMAT/ GUJCET/ JEE Main/ NEET, etc.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
Once an admission offer is made, selected students need to go through document verification and pay the admission fees to secure their spots at the university.

hostel_campus.college_name: Kadi Sarva Vishwavidyalaya Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Kadi Sarva Vishwavidyalaya has good separate hostel facilities for both boys and girls. The University possesses 5 boys’ hostel and 3 girls’ hostel. It has the capacity to accommodate approximately 10000 students. The hostels are well built and provide excellent facilities including a computer corner with internet and Wi-Fi connection, 24 hours power backup. Recreation facilities are also available like TV room, billiard room, indoor games and well-furnished gyms separately for boys and girls. The hostel messes are run with active cooperation and involvement of the students.

library.description: University have many libraries in the institute/s and has selection of more than 200000 books of Indian and foreign author with approximately 9000 titles. There are more than 100 journals of national and international editions including e-journal and more than 1000 proceedings & conference of IEEE. The library is fully air-conditioned with internet connection for accessing e-journals and other sites of interest.

review_summary.college_name: Babu Sunder Singh Institute of Technology and Management Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: True side of BSSITM and BSSCOP.

content.Placements: Currently, I am in B. Tech 2nd year and we are not going to be placed now. But I have heard about my seniors placements. Those placements and their packages are not good. That was a mistake of that batch they had not prepared themselves according to industry neither there was any kind of clear guidance on what to do for better placements. The highest salary package offered is 13 LPA. The average salary package offered is 3 LPA. Students who have maintain score above 8 GPA can easily grab internships in companies like Softpro India.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of our college is not too big. But it is very wide which allows us to explore it. College has multiple Wi-Fi connections in hostel (every block and corner has its own Wi-Fi). Library and computer labs are available. Canteen of our college is good but food of mess depends upon admissions. When it is admission season the food and all facilities of college will be best, later they start reducing the facilities. Sports at this college are very good as well as the grounds and courts for volleyball, and badminton for boys and girls both are well prepared.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely good if your budget is very low.

content.Placements: In my course, the placement is very low; you have to take off college placement. HCL, Infosys, Wipro, Google, and Microsoft are top companies. Coding and network-related work was there. The job is quite tough; you have to prove yourself because competition is very hard.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are fully ventilated, and there is a good quality of chair and table to sit. The Wi-Fi is present only at the hostel side area, and there is a library that is free for students; you can take your subject books from there. The hostel facility has an AC along with a fan and two meals a day, along with two snacks; the quality of food is not good compared to the price.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: If you have a low budget and you want to enrol in B.Tech in computer Science.

content.Placements: There is very little placement in my college which is around 10%. The highest package was 13 LPA but it is off campus. In-campus placements are very less. Small recruiting companies come into college that offer the role of sales, associate software development etc. The chances of getting an internship are also low.
content.Infrastructure: My college has an average infrastructure. It has a separate classroom and laboratory for each branch. The library is available for all the students in the college running period and it is free of cost. Wi-Fi is available in colleges but not everywhere. The hostel has poor facilities, food quality is average in mess. Sports and medical facilities are nice.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college has excellent faculty members and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Our college offers job and internship opportunities. It offers jobs to deserving students. Many companies visit here to hire students every year, and a separate cell is dedicated to placements of the students. Our college makes students much eligible so that they can qualify in placements in the best company.
content.Infrastructure: All the labs, including a computer lab, physics lab, electrical lab and also chemistry lab are available for students. There are huge classrooms, which has enough fans and lights. The hostel facility is very good. The mess is available, which provides excellent food. First aid medical facility is available on the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Our college is the best if you are concern about both academics and innovation.

content.Placements: The college invites various companies like Helios Packaging, Lok-Beta Pharmaceuticals Pvt. Ltd., MKG Consultants, KP Reliable, Micromax and HCL for placements. About 60-70% of the students from our course get placed. The highest salary package offered is 4 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 4 LPA. About 50% of the students from our course got the paid internship.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel facility is above average. We get only vegetarian food in the mess, but on-demand it also serves non-vegetarian food. Facilities like medical, open gym and sports ground are available in the hostel. The college provides Wi-Fi facility for students. Labs are good with well-equipped equipment. Students involve in institution innovation council by MHRD.

admission_process.title: Babu Sunder Singh Institute of Technology and Management Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Babu Sunder Singh Institute of Technology and Management admission process is both merit and entrance-based, depending on the course. It offers courses at the UG, PG and After 10th levels. Candidates who are selected for admission must pay the course fee to secure their seat.
The application process is conducted online. Candidates must contact the admission office for more details.

description: Babu Sunder Singh Institute of Technology and Management cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech programme for all categories and rounds in the both the All India and Home State quota. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about Babu Sunder Singh Institute of Technology and Management UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. The Babu Sunder Singh Institute of Technology and Management cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Babu Sunder Singh Institute of Technology and Management BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 621511 and 1080491 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce compet

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence And Machine Learning was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 621511 for the general AI quota.
On the contrary, the least competitive specialisation for admission in 2024 was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering with closing cutoff rank of .

Babu Sunder Singh Institute of Technology and Management accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Babu Sunder Singh Institute of Technology and Management can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

Babu Sunder Singh Institute of Technology and Management JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. Candidates can refer to the table below to download the consolidated year-wise counselling rounds for Babu Sunder Singh Institute of Technology and Management.

As the Babu Sunder Singh Institute of Technology and Management UPTAC Cutoff 2025 has been concluded for all rounds and categories under the AI and HS quota. Students can refer to the table below to find the Round 1 and Last Round closing cutoff ranks for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations available at Babu Sunder Singh Institute of Technology and Management.
In this section, students can see UPTAC Cutoff 2025 for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations.

For 2025, in the last round, the top three most competitive specialisations for admission in the General AI category students were B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering, followed by B.Tech. in Civil Engineering, and B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering, with the closing ranks of 1888474, 2117389 and 2118017, respectively.

For admission to Babu Sunder Singh Institute of Technology and Management for B.E. / B.Tech students have to clear the UPTAC exam and attain valid ranks to qualify for a seat at this institute.
